---
title: Reference Markdown Article Fixture
description: Test article fixture for canonical Markdown references.
date: 2026-01-01T00:00:00.000Z
author: Test Author
tags:
  - test
---

Markdown article fixtures can cite a source.[^cite-md-article-source]

Markdown article fixtures can also use a note.[^note-md-article-context]

[^note-md-article-context]: This explanatory note belongs to the Markdown article fixture.

```tpm-bibtex
@article{md-article-source,
  author = {Source, Markdown},
  title = {Reference Fixture},
  year = {2026},
  url = {https://example.com/md-article-source}
}
```
